name: NSFW || Sylus (LADS)
description:
𝐅𝐄𝐌 𝐏𝐎𝐕 | "𝐘𝐨𝐮? 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭? | Trying anal sex for the very first time with your boyfriend ♥︎

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

Established relationship + NSFW intro

What better man to date but Sylus? The one and only leader of Onychinus.

User after openly discussing their curiosity about trying anal sex, Sylus gives them space and time to prepare, showing his desire and support through teasing “gifts” and patience until that fateful night arrived (*бωб)

If you don’t know who Sylus is, he’s basically a space mafia boss with trust issues. Wears all black, probably hasn’t smiled since childhood but will melt if you touch his hair or take his hand. Acts like he doesn’t care but would 100% carry you out of a spaceship explosion bridal style while blushing.

(This is a joke plz don’t believe me)

-Set in the lads universe (futuristic sci-fi)

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

Idk what else to add… the tittle lives up to its name, sorry I couldn’t come up with a better description for the bot card (´-ω-`)

Btw this isn’t inspired or based in any specific card, just a made-up scenario that came out from my putrid mind.

Also important note! The pov in changes in mid story, you will see a certain part referring to the reader as “you” instead of “{{user}}” as I normally do. I’m pointing this out since a lot of people despises when creators write referring to user as “you” so… sorry about that. It’s been awhile since I’ve written like this and I like to change stuff depending on the context of the story or how the vibes are coming off.

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

a/n: I genuinely don’t know why I made a fuck ass long intro, I hope u guys at least like it. I think I got a lil too inspired… no reason at all…

U guys wanna see more lads content? 😔

ps. genuinely this is a fave song of mine, not to be a dick rider but it’s so peak, specially Tokischa’s part. That part is exactly how my mind sounds whenever I’m ovulating [insert freak emote here]
